title: Azadirachta indica (Neem)
benefits_text: Azadirachta indica, commonly known as Neem, has a wide range of health benefits that are linked to its antibacterial, antifungal, antimalarial, and anti-inflammatory properties. It can boost the immune system, fight off harmful bacteria, and reduce inflammation, making it beneficial for various health conditions. Neem improves liver function, helps lower blood sugar levels, and reduces blood cholesterol, contributing to better cardiovascular health. It also promotes skin health by treating skin conditions, healing wounds, and preventing oral problems, including cavities and gum diseases. Neem's antiparasitic properties are effective in killing head lice, intestinal worms, and treating malaria. Furthermore, it can prevent cancer growth, improve eye health, relieve menstrual discomfort, and reduce stress, demonstrating its potential as a holistic remedy for various health issues.
